decks.title: English Terminology — Full medical vocabulary deck
decks.description: 1,198 term-definition cards covering medical terminology word-building (prefixes, suffixes, plurals) plus system-by-system vocabulary: digestive, urinary, reproductive, cardiovascular, blood, respiratory, skeletal, and muscular systems. Text-only (rebuilt from a Quizlet-imported deck to strip audio and fit under the static-asset size limit).
